response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with a strong match to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). His work includes scalable systems (Optilyz, Dunnhumby), AI agent infrastructure (re:cinq), and architecture decisions (GISCollective, Kubernetes). Demonstrated leadership in DevOps (CI/CD, Docker) and testing frameworks aligns with the role's requirements.
strengths: Proven ability to build and scale high-performance systems (Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and modern frameworks (MCP, Vitest)
concerns: Recent role at re:cinq is very short (since April 2025), limiting visibility into long-term impact
No explicit mention of working with Nest.js, a core primary stack requirement
Limited details on cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) experience beyond AWS CDK
